projectDescription: A guide to special control instructions for switching thinking chain styles in DeepSeek-V4 roleplay (角色扮演) mode.
keyFeatures: Three thinking modes: default, character immersion (角色沉浸), and pure analysis (纯分析)
Copy-paste ready control instruction strings for each mode
Works in DeepSeek official app/web expert mode and deepseek-v4-flash / deepseek-v4-pro APIs
Instructions persist across conversation turns via context history
Python API integration example with helper functions
publicApiSurface: INNER_OS_MARKER — instruction string for character immersion mode
NO_INNER_OS_MARKER — instruction string for pure analysis mode
build_messages(system_prompt, user_first_message, mode) — helper to inject marker into first user message
